error.signature: OSError: model-org/model-name is not a local folder and is not a valid model identifier listed on 'https://huggingface.co/models'
error.regex: (is not a local folder|not a valid model identifier|RepositoryNotFoundError|404.*model.*not found|repository.*not.*found.*huggingface)

verdict.summary: Model identifier not found on Hugging Face Hub. Typo in model name, private repo, or model was deleted/renamed.

dead_ends.action: Search for the model on external mirror sites
dead_ends.why_fails: External mirrors may host outdated, tampered, or license-violating copies. Always use the official Hub.

dead_ends.action: Assume the Hub is down and retry later
dead_ends.why_fails: If the model ID is wrong, retrying will never work. Verify the model name first.

workarounds.action: Verify exact model ID on huggingface.co/models
workarounds.how: Model IDs are case-sensitive and include the org: 'meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf' not 'llama-2-7b'

workarounds.action: Authenticate for private or gated models
Check if model was renamed or deprecated and find the new ID
workarounds.how: Search huggingface.co/models for the model family; check the model card for migration notes
